title: 10 INCREDIBLE ChatGPT Prompts That Will UNLOCK Your Productivity in 2026
body_excerpt: Are you tired of being stuck in your old workflow? These 10 game-changing ChatGPT prompts will revolutionize the way you work! Number 7 will blow your mind. (1) Write me a marketing email — game-changer. (2) Summarize this article — saves hours. (3) ...
expected_reason: Hits hard_rejects: listicle_pattern (numbered-list-in-title gimmick), pure_marketing_announcement (no source, no specifics), vibes_only_take (manufactured excitement, no falsifiable claim). Body fails inclusion_gates: testable_or_demonstrable, primary_source_identifiable.
